mapper.select: SELECT pc.product_barcode AS productBarcode, pc.product_name AS productName, pc.miniapp_name AS miniappName, pc.main_image AS mainImage, pc.sales_region_code AS salesRegionCode, pd.price AS price, pc.order_base_qty AS orderBaseQty, pc.order_min_qty AS orderMinQty, pc.order_max_qty AS orderMaxQty FROM prd_product_catalog pc INNER JOIN prd_price_group pg ON pc.sales_region_code = pg.sales_region_code INNER JOIN prd_price_detail pd ON pc.product_barcode = pd.product_barcode and pg.price_group_code=pd.price_group_code WHERE pc.status = 'LISTED' AND pg.price_group_code = #{priceGroupCode} ORDER BY pc.updated_at DESC

SELECT pc.product_barcode AS productBarcode, pc.product_name AS productName, pc.sales_region_code AS salesRegionCode, pc.status AS status, pc.miniapp_name AS miniappName, pc.main_image AS mainImage, pc.order_base_qty AS orderBaseQty, pc.order_min_qty AS orderMinQty, pc.order_max_qty AS orderMaxQty, pc.daily_available AS dailyAvailable, pc.warehouse_code AS warehouseCode, pc.warehouse_name AS warehouseName, pd.price AS price FROM prd_product_catalog pc INNER JOIN prd_price_group pg ON pc.sales_region_code = pg.sales_region_code INNER JOIN prd_price_detail pd ON pc.product_barcode = pd.product_barcode and pg.price_group_code=pd.price_group_code WHERE pg.price_group_code = #{priceGroupCode} AND pc.product_barcode IN
#{barcode}
